title: Chest pain
source_review_basis: full authoritative documents inspected and archived; item-level retain/rewrite/remove/add comparisons recorded

assessment.text: Defines chest-pain scope in DHA telehealth and emphasises potentially life-threatening causes and emergency exclusion.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Chest Pain – 45
source.population: People presenting with chest pain; no precise age range is stated in the applicability section.
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for Dubai telehealth chest-pain documentation; partial for a setting-agnostic GP workflow and emergency presentations excluded from telehealth.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Defines chest-pain scope in DHA telehealth and emphasises potentially life-threatening causes and emergency exclusion.

assessment.text: Defines chest-pain scope in DHA telehealth and emphasises potentially life-threatening causes and emergency exclusion.

assessment.text: Specifies onset, site, character, radiation, severity, exertional and relieving factors, associated symptoms, duration, trauma, travel, and prior testing.
assessment.rationale: Directly supports mapped onset, location, character, radiation, exertional relationship, duration, associated symptoms, and relieving factors.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Chest Pain – 45
source.population: People presenting with chest pain; no precise age range is stated in the applicability section.
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for Dubai telehealth chest-pain documentation; partial for a setting-agnostic GP workflow and emergency presentations excluded from telehealth.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Specifies onset, site, character, radiation, severity, exertional and relieving factors, associated symptoms, duration, trauma, travel, and prior testing.

assessment.text: Lists life-threatening chest-pain patterns, associated breathlessness, syncope, diaphoresis, abnormal physiology, and emergency referral requirements.
assessment.rationale: Directly supports mapped exertional, radiation, syncope, breathlessness, diaphoresis, and abnormal-physiology concern prompts.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Chest Pain – 45
source.population: People presenting with chest pain; no precise age range is stated in the applicability section.
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for Dubai telehealth chest-pain documentation; partial for a setting-agnostic GP workflow and emergency presentations excluded from telehealth.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Lists life-threatening chest-pain patterns, associated breathlessness, syncope, diaphoresis, abnormal physiology, and emergency referral requirements.

assessment.text: Limits testing to the assessed presentation and lists blood studies, chest radiography, ECG, and echocardiography where clinically indicated.
assessment.rationale: Directly supports mapped clinician-selected ECG, chest imaging, and blood-test documentation.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Chest Pain – 45
source.population: People presenting with chest pain; no precise age range is stated in the applicability section.
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for Dubai telehealth chest-pain documentation; partial for a setting-agnostic GP workflow and emergency presentations excluded from telehealth.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Defines chest-pain scope in DHA telehealth and emphasises potentially life-threatening causes and emergency exclusion.

rewrites.final_wording: Specifies onset, site, character, radiation, severity, exertional and relieving factors, associated symptoms, duration, trauma, travel, and prior testing.
